    API Framework

    Overview

    A simple API plugin for WordPress, that serves more as a framework for those wanting to craft their own RESTful API service.

    The plugin has 2 endpoints set up; one for authenticating users and one for posting to the blog. Access to these and endpoints you add can be toggled easily through the plugin’s settings page. Endpoints can also be marked as secure, requiring a JSON Web Token for authorization.

    Development

    Whilst WordPress already has a built in RESTful API, I wanted to create an example of how to craft a simple one from scratch, as well as display my savviness working with APIs. Mine is not quite as robust as the built in one, but much easier to get to grips with for coding novices.

    Endpoints can be marked as secure, requiring an access token. For this I used JSON Web Tokens.

    Download

    The plugin can be downloaded HERE.

    The GitHub repository can be found HERE..
